_comment: Rolepod Antigravity CLI (agy) hook config. Event names + structure verified against the live ~/.gemini/config/hooks.json on agy 1.0.13 (2026-06-30): agy uses Claude-style events (PreInvocation/PostInvocation/Stop/PreToolUse/PostToolUse), NOT Gemini's (BeforeAgent/SessionStart/BeforeTool/AfterTool/PreCompress). The hook .sh scripts are reused from the gemini adapter (CLI-agnostic context emitters); only this event wiring is agy-specific. timeout is in SECONDS (per the live orca-status example). ${extensionPath} resolves to the installed plugin dir (CHANGELOG v1.0.5). No PreCompress equivalent on agy, so the gemini pre-compress checkpoint is dropped. Confirm with `agy hooks` after install.
